theme: 9:30 candle retest rates split by candle color (green vs red)
method: Subject = 9:30-9:45 candle. Classify by close vs open: green if close > open, red if close < open, doji excluded. Then compute hit rates of H/L during 9:45-10:00 (by 10:00) and 9:45-10:15 (by 10:15).
key_finding: Strong directional asymmetry. After a green 9:30, the HIGH gets retested 74% of the time vs only 21% for the low. After a red 9:30, the LOW gets retested 74% vs 24% for the high. The candle's close direction is a near-mirror predictor of which side gets retested first.
